meta.note: Thasyan's France v Spain semi-final match parlay (1xBet). Five legs on one slip — the draw (FT 1X2), Yamal / Dembele over 0.5 shots on target, Mbappe over 1.5 shots on target, and under 3.5 total goals. All five auto-settle against verified ESPN results once the match is final; the FT 1X2 leg settles on the 90-minute result.
